Bizarre Lineage Codes — Free Rewards List (March 2026)

Every working Bizarre Lineage code in one place. We check for new codes daily and update this list within minutes of each drop. Bookmark this page to never miss free Stand Arrows, Cash, or EXP Boosts.

No Active Bizarre Lineage Codes Yet

The Bizarre Lineage code redemption system has not been released by the developers yet. Bookmark this page — we will publish every new Bizarre Lineage code the moment it drops.

How to Redeem Bizarre Lineage Codes

1

Launch Bizarre Lineage

Open Roblox and load into the Bizarre Lineage game world.

2

Open the Codes Menu

Tap the menu icon on the left side of your screen and select the codes tab.

3

Enter Your Code

Type or paste the Bizarre Lineage code exactly as shown and press Redeem.

4

Collect Rewards

Your free items — Stand Arrows, Cash, or EXP Boosts — will appear in your inventory instantly.

Where Do Bizarre Lineage Codes Come From?

Bizarre Lineage codes are released exclusively by the official development team. The most common triggers for new Bizarre Lineage code drops include reaching player milestones (such as 20K, 50K, or 100K likes on the Roblox page), seasonal holiday events, and major content patches that introduce new Stands or gameplay features.

To stay ahead, follow the official Bizarre Lineage Discord server and the game's Roblox page. Alternatively, bookmark this page — our team monitors all official channels around the clock and publishes new Bizarre Lineage codes within minutes of release.

What Will Bizarre Lineage Codes Give?

🏹

Stand Arrow

Use to roll for a random Stand. Higher rarity Stands have lower drop rates.

🍈

Rokakaka Fruit

Reset your current Stand. Useful when you get a low-tier Stand from an Arrow.

💰

In-game Cash

Currency for buying items, Fighting Styles, and Sub-Abilities.

⚡

EXP Boost

Temporary boost to experience gain for faster leveling.

While You Wait for Bizarre Lineage Codes...

Make sure you are ready to use your rewards wisely. Check the tier list to know which Stand to keep, and browse our leveling guide to maximize your XP boosts.

Bizarre Lineage Tier List Browse All Stands Leveling Guide

Bizarre Lineage Codes FAQ

Are there any active Bizarre Lineage codes right now?

As of March 2026, the Bizarre Lineage code redemption system is still being finalized by the developers. We monitor every official channel and will publish new Bizarre Lineage codes the moment they go live.

How do I redeem Bizarre Lineage codes?

Once the system launches, you will redeem Bizarre Lineage codes by opening the in-game menu, tapping the codes icon, typing the code exactly as shown, and pressing confirm. We will update this section with screenshots when the feature releases.

Where do Bizarre Lineage codes come from?

Bizarre Lineage codes are released by the official developers through their Discord server, the Roblox game page, and social media. Codes typically celebrate milestones like 50K likes, seasonal events, or major patches.

Do Bizarre Lineage codes expire?

Yes, most Bizarre Lineage codes have limited redemption windows. Codes can expire as quickly as 24 hours after release. Bookmark this page to stay updated and never miss a Bizarre Lineage code drop.

What rewards do Bizarre Lineage codes give?

Bizarre Lineage codes typically reward free Stand Arrows, Rokakaka Fruits for re-rolling Stands, in-game Cash, and EXP Boost items. Some rare Bizarre Lineage codes may offer exclusive cosmetics.
